name: Good Morning Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 29 ounces Sliced Peaches or 21 ounces Apple Pie Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, and salt.
3. Cut in Crisco until crumbly. Set aside 1 cup of crumbs.
4. Add milk, eggs, vanilla extract, baking powder, and lemon juice; mix on medium speed for 2 minutes.
5. Pour batter into a greased 13x9 inch pan.
6. Bake for 25 minutes or until set.
7. In another bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add condensed milk, lemon juice, fruit (peaches or apples), half the nut mixture, and cinnamon; mix well.
8. Stir together reserved crumbs, remaining nuts, cinnamon, and 1/3 cup brown sugar.
9. Spread fruit mixture over the cake batter.
10. Sprinkle crumb mixture evenly on top.
11. Bake for an additional 35 minutes or until golden brown.
12. Allow to cool before serving warm.
